name: sn_e2
drl:
rule R_hi salience 20 when $t : T0($b : f1, f0 == false) not(T1(k == $b) and T2()) then end
rule R_upd salience 10 when $g : G() $t : T0() then modify($t){ setF1(2) } end
rule R_lo salience 5 when $t : T0($b : f1, f0 == false) not(T1(k == $b) and T2()) then end
rule R_ctl salience 4 when $t : T0($b : f1, f0 == false) not T1(k == $b) then end
